== Notes for [[Item:Q116282|Q116282]] ==

'''Garcia Iñiguez''' died after 1084

== Sources ==

[http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/VIZCAYA.htm#InigoLopezdied1077 FMG MedLands Vizcaya]

--------------------
'''Garcia López''', Vizconde de Baïgorry

== Sources ==

[http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NAVARRE%20NOBILITY.htm#InigoLopezdied1077 FMG MedLands]

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
